goal: User uses attr-first phrasings ('friction on X', 'radius for Y') with 2 false values. Agent must verify via get_attribute and report actual values.
thoughts: Integration test for the attr_pat_attr_first regex added to Fas 2 verify-contract item (e). Attr-first phrasing is natural but was a regex gap until a880236.
code:
get_attribute(prim_path="/World/Floor", attr_name="physics:dynamicFriction")
# -> 0.5
get_attribute(prim_path="/World/Ball", attr_name="radius")
# -> 0.5
# Reply: 'Both false — friction on /World/Floor is 0.5 (not 0.9), radius for /World/Ball is 0.5 (not 0.1).'
failure_modes: Echoing 'yes, 0.9' — attr-first regex fires but agreement was written first.
